basic_details.job_title: PAU Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Punjab Agricultural University (PAU) has released the official Teaching Assistant (FMPE) Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 1 Teaching Assistant (FMPE) vacancy has been announced under the PAU Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Bachelor's degree in Agricultural Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and a Master's degree in Farm Machinery & Power Engineering/Farm Power Machinery, along with the prescribed academic qualifications and Punjabi language requirement, can apply through Offline mode on or before 23 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Agriculture Engineering/Mechanical Engineering, Master's degree in Farm Machinery & Power Engineering/Farm Power Machinery
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Agriculture Engineering/Mechanical Engineering. Master's degree in Farm Machinery & Power Engineering/Farm Power Machinery. At least 60% marks at Bachelor's level and 65% marks or OCPA of 6.50 out of 10.00 at Master's level. Matric level certificate of Punjabi Language from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized Board (as first or Second language). Note: A candidate who does not possess Master's degree in the relevant subject but possesses Ph.D. degree in the discipline required at Master's level shall be eligible for the post.

salary_details.details: Rs. 35,000/- fixed p.m. for Master degree Rs. 40,000/- p.m. fixed for Ph.D.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.punjab_agricultural_university_pau: Bachelor's degree in Agriculture Engineering/Mechanical Engineering, Master's degree in Farm Machinery & Power Engineering/Farm Power Machinery

content_sections.heading: PAU Teaching Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PAU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PAU Teaching Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in Agriculture Engineering/Mechanical Engineering. Master's degree in Farm Machinery & Power Engineering/Farm Power Machinery. At least 60% marks at Bachelor's level and 65% marks or OCPA of 6.50 out of 10.00 at Master's level. Matric level certificate of Punjabi Language from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized Board (as first or Second language). Note: A candidate who does not possess Master's degree in the relevant subject but possesses Ph.D. degree in the discipline required at Master's level shall be eligible for the post.

content_sections.heading: PAU Teaching Assistant Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: PAU Teaching Assistant Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 35,000/- fixed p.m. for Master degree Rs. 40,000/- p.m. fixed for Ph.D.

content_sections.heading: PAU Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://pau.edu. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 23-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PAU Teaching Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) recruitment is 23 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Teaching Assistant (FMPE) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Agriculture Engineering/Mechanical Engineering and a Master's degree in Farm Machinery & Power Engineering/Farm Power Machinery with specific minimum marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for the PAU Teaching Assistant (FMPE) recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 200/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Teaching Assistant (FMPE) position?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves a screening of documents. Candidates are advised to ensure all their submitted documents are accurate and complete.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Information regarding age relaxation for reserved categories is not explicitly detailed in the provided data. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for specific details.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Assistant (FMPE) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 35,000/- per month for candidates with a Master's degree and Rs. 40,000/- per month for those with a Ph.D. degree.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Does the recruitment require a Punjabi language certificate?
faq.answer: Yes, a Matric level certificate of Punjabi Language from Punjab School Education Board or any other recognized Board is required, either as a first or second language.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is COA-1/2026/657-716.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can typically be found on the official website of Punjab Agricultural University (PAU), which is https://pau.edu.
